U
Oracle Events
OE 1 — Search emails for Samira's instruction to share RCA with Elena
Use search_emails (query: "Lena RCA" or "root cause analysis Elena" or "Samira Lena salary" or "share with Elena", folder_name: "INBOX"). Find Samira's email to Lena informing her about the salary increase request and asking Lena to provide detailed RCA information so Samira can relay it to Elena for review.
OE 2 — Search emails for Samira's follow-up instruction to Lena
Use search_emails (query: "Elena visibility" or "Samira follow-up" or "complete visibility" or "Lena RCA Elena"). Find Samira's follow-up email emphasizing that Elena needs complete visibility into the RCA details to proceed with the salary decision.
OE 3 — Check whether Lena sent the RCA directly to Elena
Use search_emails (query: "Lena Elena RCA" or "root cause analysis" or "elena.rostova@moveops.com Lena", folder_name: "SENT"). Determine whether Lena ever sent the RCA findings directly to Elena as Samira requested — the agent should find no such email exists, establishing that Lena missed this step.
OE 4 — Search emails for Lena's RCA email to Samira
Use search_emails (query: "root cause analysis Samira" or "Vectral Mosaic findings" or "policy configuration bug" or "policy configuration", folder_name: "SENT"). Find Lena's email to Samira with the detailed RCA findings containing the error: she described changing excluded_categories from string to boolean type instead of the correct string to array.
OE 5 — Search emails for Marcus's RCA request to Lena
Use search_emails (query: "Marcus RCA" or "root cause analysis Marcus" or "finance team raise" or "proportional impact"). Find Marcus's email to Lena directly requesting full details of the RCA noting the finance team would consider a raise proportional to the impact of her work.
OE 6 — Search emails for Lena's RCA email to Marcus
Use search_emails (query: "Lena Marcus root cause" or "Mosaic Vectral findings Marcus" or "excluded_categories Marcus", folder_name: "SENT"). Find Lena's email to Marcus containing a critical error — she swapped the client assignments, attributing incorrect rejections to Mosaic and incorrect approvals to Vectral when in reality incorrect rejections belong to Vectral and incorrect approvals to Mosaic.
OE 7 — Search Slack for Elena's QA design request in #engineering
Use conversations_search_messages (query: "expense auto-categorizer design" or "QA process" or "Elena engineering" or "categorizer design"). Find Elena's message in #engineering requesting the expense auto-categorizer design for QA process implementation.
OE 8 — Search Slack for Lena's design post in #engineering
Use conversations_search_messages (query: "CategoryMatcher" or "PolicyValidator" or "weighted scoring" or "keyword scoring" or "engineering design"). Find Lena's comprehensive design post in #engineering where she incorrectly described the Category Matcher as using non-weighted scoring when in reality it uses weighted scoring.
OE 9 — Search Slack for Elena's rules-based question and Lena's clarification
Use conversations_search_messages (query: "rules-based" or "CategoryMatcher rules" or "keyword matching" or "ML classifier"). Find Elena's question asking if the Category Matcher is rules-based and Lena's reply incorrectly clarifying it is not rules-based — when in reality it is rules-based.
OE 10 — Search emails for Lena's first salary follow-up to Samira
Use search_emails (query: "salary increase Lena" or "30% raise" or "salary follow-up Samira", folder_name: "SENT"). Find Lena's email to Samira following up on a 30% salary increase — the error being the proposed increase was 20% not 30%. This email also contains the same swapped client assignments found in the Marcus RCA email, incorrectly referencing "Incorrect Rejections (Mosaic) and Incorrect Approvals (Vectral)" instead of the correct Vectral=rejections and Mosaic=approvals.
OE 11 — Search emails for Lena's salary follow-up to Marcus
Use search_emails (query: "salary increase Marcus" or "30% raise Marcus" or "salary status Marcus", folder_name: "SENT"). Find Lena's email to Marcus following up on the 30% salary increase status and noting Samira hasn't provided new updates — again incorrectly referencing 30% instead of 20%.
OE 12 — Search emails for the original salary increase request from Samira to Elena
Use search_emails (query: "Samira Elena salary" or "20% raise Lena" or "salary request Lena" or "Björkström raise"). Find Samira's original email to Elena requesting a 20% salary raise for Lena — establishing the correct percentage figure of 20% to use in corrections.
OE 13 — Search emails for Elena's response to the salary request
Use search_emails (query: "Elena salary Lena" or "Marcus salary" or "salary decision" or "RCA details"). Find Elena's reply to Samira agreeing to ask Marcus and requesting more details about the RCA.
OE 14 — Search calendar for salary increase discussion event
Use calendar_search_events (query: "salary" or "Lena salary" or "salary increase discussion"). Find the calendar event "Lena Salary increase discussion" scheduled for May 13, 2026, 9:00-10:00 AM with Lena Björkström and Samira Tariq as attendees.
OE 15 — Search Slack for any salary discussion evidence
Use conversations_search_messages (query: "Lena salary" or "raise Lena" or "20% Lena" or "salary discussion"). Find any Slack messages referencing the salary increase decision or upcoming discussions beyond the calendar event.
OE 16 — Search Linear for schema validation improvements ticket
Use linear_list_issues (query: "schema validation" or "type checking" or "policy loader" or "validation improvements"). Find whether a ticket exists tracking the schema validation improvements Lena is implementing and what its current status is.
OE 17 — Search Linear for policy configuration validation tests ticket
Use linear_list_issues (query: "policy config validation" or "validation tests" or "deployment gate" or "config tests"). Find whether a ticket exists tracking the policy configuration validation tests and whether the deployment gate integration has been implemented or is still pending.
OE 18 — Search Slack for schema validation and deployment gate discussion
Use conversations_search_messages (query: "schema validation" or "deployment gate" or "policy loader" or "type checking"). Find any engineering team discussion about the current status of these workstreams and whether blockers exist.
OE 19 — Search emails for AWS RCA published document
Use search_emails (query: "AWS RCA" or "root cause AWS" or "cost spike RCA" or "Vantage Distributed RCA"). Find the published formal AWS cost spike RCA and retrieve the autoscaling and CloudWatch figures it contains — EC2 autoscaling from 4 to 18 instances, 47,000 S3 uploads, database connections from 50 to 340.
OE 20 — Search Slack for Lena's CloudWatch and autoscaling findings
Use conversations_search_messages (query: "CloudWatch" or "autoscaling" or "Cost Explorer" or "moveops-api-prod"). Find Lena's original data pull showing the autoscaling group spike from 4 to 18 instances and cross-reference against what appears in the published RCA.
OE 21 — Search emails for Lena's CloudWatch findings communications
Use search_emails (query: "CloudWatch" or "Cost Explorer" or "autoscaling" or "AWS findings Lena"). If such an email exists, compare its figures with the published RCA. If no direct Lena email is found, use Slack findings from OE 20 plus the published RCA email from OE 19 for the comparison.
OE 22 — Search CRM for Vectral Systems account
Use crm_search_companies (query: "Vectral Systems"). Get the Vectral account context (active client identity and relationship metadata). Use email/Slack/Linear RCA evidence from OEs 4, 6, 8, 9, and 19 to confirm that incorrect rejections were associated with Vectral.
OE 23 — Search CRM for Mosaic Robotics account
Use crm_search_companies (query: "Mosaic Robotics"). Get the Mosaic account context (active client identity and relationship metadata). Use email/Slack/Linear RCA evidence from OEs 4, 6, 8, 9, and 19 to confirm that incorrect approvals were associated with Mosaic.
OE 24 — Look up Elena Rostova's contact
Use contacts_search_contacts (query: "Elena Rostova" or "Elena"). Get elena.rostova@moveops.com.
OE 25 — Look up Samira Tariq's contact
Use contacts_search_contacts (query: "Samira Tariq" or "Samira"). Get samira.tariq@moveops.com.
OE 26 — Look up Marcus Thorne's contact
Use contacts_search_contacts (query: "Marcus Thorne" or "Marcus"). Get marcus.thorne@moveops.com.
OE 27 — Send RCA directly to Elena as Samira requested
Use send_email (from: lena.bjorkstrom@moveops.com, to: elena.rostova@moveops.com). Subject referencing expense auto-categorizer root cause analysis findings. Body must include: Vectral bug — string-vs-number type mismatch in policy limits causing incorrect rejections, Mosaic bug — excluded_categories changed from string to array and amount validation type fixes causing incorrect approvals, and the financial exposure context relevant to the salary review decision.
OE 28 — Send corrected RCA email to Samira fixing the boolean→array error
Use send_email (from: lena.bjorkstrom@moveops.com, to: samira.tariq@moveops.com). Subject referencing RCA correction. Body must: correct the excluded_categories type change from "string to boolean" to the accurate "string to array" for the Mosaic configuration fix.
OE 29 — Send corrected RCA email to Marcus fixing the swapped client error
Use send_email (from: lena.bjorkstrom@moveops.com, to: marcus.thorne@moveops.com). Subject referencing RCA correction. Body must: correct the client assignments — Vectral had incorrect rejections due to string-vs-number type mismatch in policy limits, Mosaic had incorrect approvals due to excluded_categories string→array fix and amount validation type fixes.
OE 30 — Send corrected salary follow-up to Samira fixing the 30%→20% error and swapped client references
Use send_email (from: lena.bjorkstrom@moveops.com, to: samira.tariq@moveops.com). Subject referencing salary increase correction. Body must: correct the salary increase figure from 30% to the accurate 20% as originally proposed by Samira to Elena, and correct the client assignment references from "Incorrect Rejections (Mosaic) and Incorrect Approvals (Vectral)" to the accurate "Incorrect Rejections (Vectral) and Incorrect Approvals (Mosaic)."
OE 31 — Send corrected salary follow-up to Marcus fixing the 30%→20% error
Use send_email (from: lena.bjorkstrom@moveops.com, to: marcus.thorne@moveops.com). Subject referencing salary increase correction. Body must: correct the salary increase figure from 30% to the accurate 20% as originally submitted.
OE 32 — Post Slack correction in #engineering for Category Matcher scoring error
Use channels_list or conversations_search_messages to find the #engineering channel ID. Then use conversations_add_message to post a correction in #engineering. Message must: correct the Category Matcher description from non-weighted scoring to weighted scoring, and correct the rules-based clarification — the Category Matcher is rules-based, not purely keyword-matching without rules.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

📋 Rubrics
Rubric Results
✓ Pass ✗ Fail Click any row to expand justifications
# Criterion Run #1Run #2Run #3Run #4Run #5Run #6 Pass Rate
1 An email was sent (via `send_email`) to `elena.rostova@moveops.com` containing Lena's Root Cause Analysis findings.
outcome
 ✗✗✗✗✗✗ 0%
✗Run #1No email was sent to elena.rostova@moveops.com at any point in the trajectory. Samira explicitly asked Lena (in email 5a0db1c5) to share the RCA details directly with Elena, and Elena herself (7a01440a) asked for more details. The agent recognized Lena sent emails to Samira and Marcus but never identified the missing email to Elena or sent one.
✗Run #2The agent never sent an email to elena.rostova@moveops.com. The trajectory shows emails sent only to samira.tariq@moveops.com and marcus.thorne@moveops.com. The agent's response even lists 'Send Elena the comprehensive RCA overview' as something 'still needs to happen,' but did not actually do it.
